name: exchekskillsvideo
description: ExChek Engine (Video) — render branded, narrated, audit-traceable compliance video summaries (.mp4) from any ExChekSkills .json sibling. Five templates: risk-triage, classification, red-flag, compliance-report-card, training. Optional ElevenLabs narration. The .docx remains the audit-of-record. Companion to the exchekskills plugin.

default_render_dir.title: Default video output folder
default_render_dir.description: Where rendered .mp4 files land. Defaults to the ExChek-Reports folder so videos sit alongside their .docx and .json siblings. You can always override per-render.

elevenlabs_voice_id.title: ElevenLabs voice ID (optional)
elevenlabs_voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice for narration. Defaults to Sarah (EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL) — clear, professional. Other recommended voices: Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM), Adam (pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB), Juniper (aMSt68OGf4xUZAnLpTU8). Only used when you opt into narration.

elevenlabs_api_key.title: ElevenLabs API key (sensitive, optional)
elevenlabs_api_key.description: Required only if you opt into narration AND you don't already have the ElevenLabs MCP plugin or the ElevenLabs connector installed. Stored in your OS keychain — never in plain text. Get a key at https://elevenlabs.io. Cost is ~1¢ per video.

default_quality.title: Default render quality
default_quality.description: draft | standard | high. Draft is ~2x faster; high is ~3x slower. Standard is fine for most deliverables.

default_fps.title: Default frame rate
default_fps.description: 24 | 30 | 60. 30 is right for most cases; 60 is worth it only for motion-heavy templates on large screens.

narration_default.title: Narration default behavior
narration_default.description: ask | always | never. 'ask' prompts you each time (recommended). 'always' tries to narrate every render and falls back to silent if ElevenLabs isn't configured. 'never' renders silent without prompting.

cui_render_mode.title: CUI / classified handling
cui_render_mode.description: refuse | silent. When the source ExChekSkills report has cui_check.cui or cui_check.classified true: 'refuse' (default) refuses the render entirely; 'silent' renders silently with no narration and stamps a notice on the video. Narration is always refused regardless of this setting.
